meaning: n.确认,查证,作证,[律]诉状结尾的举证声明
examples: You should also see all of the verification points and test objects listed in the Script Explorer on the right.
All charges against her are dropped pending the verification of her story.
The data hub will be used as the verification system for ObamaCare's complex subsidy formula.
Last month, engines were installed, ground vibration tests and flight test instrumentation verification were completed.
